items.content:
About This Role

We are looking for a Brand Designer to elevate our visual identity and ensure consistency across every touchpoint. From marketing campaigns and social media to event materials and product illustrations, you will be the guardian and champion of our brand.

You will work closely with the marketing and product design teams, bringing a sharp eye for typography, color, and composition to everything we put in front of the world.

Responsibilities

  • Create visual assets for marketing campaigns, social media, blog posts, and email newsletters
  • Design presentation templates, event materials, and branded collateral
  • Maintain and evolve the brand style guide, ensuring consistency across all channels
  • Produce illustrations, icons, and motion graphics for product and marketing use
  • Collaborate with content and demand gen teams to bring campaigns to life visually

Requirements

  • 3+ years of brand or visual design experience
  • Strong portfolio showcasing brand systems, campaign design, and multi-format output
  • Expert proficiency in Figma, Adobe Creative Suite (Illustrator, Photoshop, InDesign)
  • Understanding of print production, digital ad specifications, and responsive design
  • Excellent eye for typography, layout, and color theory

Nice to Have

  • Motion graphics experience with After Effects or Lottie
  • Experience with 3D illustration tools (Blender, Spline)
  • Photography or art direction skills
